description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. Carry it to college, work or on a casual day out with your friends.Product DetailsPredator series backpack with orange theme, one front zipped pocket, one main zipped compartment with inner zipped pocket, two zipped pockets on either side, two adjustable shoulder straps with progressive shock control, foam padding at the back for carrying ease, fabric zip pulls, haul loop, branding at the sideMaterial and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 47 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 12 cm
